channel.title: GitHub Zig Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Zig in GitHub

item.title: ghostty-org/ghostty
item.description: 👻 Ghostty is a fast, feature-rich, and cross-platform terminal emulator that uses platform-native UI and GPU acceleration.

item.title: ziglang/zig
item.description: General-purpose programming language and toolchain for maintaining robust, optimal, and reusable software.

item.title: tigerbeetle/tigerbeetle
item.description: The financial transactions database designed for mission critical safety and performance.

item.title: lightpanda-io/browser
item.description: Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation

item.title: zigtools/zls
item.description: A language server for Zig supporting developers with features like autocomplete and goto definition

item.title: electric-capital/crypto-ecosystems
item.description: A taxonomy for open source cryptocurrency, blockchain, and decentralized ecosystems

item.title: jackielii/skhd.zig
item.description: Simple Hotkey Daemon for macOS, ported from skhd by koekeishiya

item.title: oven-sh/bun
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
